full_text:
Sima Jin (Huida) 司馬進 (惠達)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Sima Jin (司馬進), styledHuida (惠達). 6th son of Sima Fang, he would hold a minor court office under Wei. His son, Ti, would be enfeoffed as a King when Sima Yan took the throne. Sima Jin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
